title: Minetivity
description: Advanced Discord Rich Presence for Minecraft
body:
# Minetivity - Advanced Discord Rich Presence for Minecraft
## Why Minetivity?
After searching for a Rich Presence Mod, which I could recommend the users of my Server, I only found outdated ones or ones, which do not have a Server-sided customization function, so I decided to make a new one. And now, here it is: Minetivity.

## Usage
You can simply download this file to your mods dirctory. Please make sure, that you also have installed a recent version of the Fabric API, as this mod needs it to run. The mod should simply work, when you have Discord open.

## Features
The mod supports several states, including the following ones:
- Menu, displayed when you are not in a world or server
- Singleplayer, when you are in a single player world
- Current server, displayed in format "Playing on play.example.com"
- Reimplementation of the LabyMod Rich Presence Protocol

## API
As of right now, there is no official API. However, as we have support for the LabyMod protocol, you can send messages via the LabyMod API or the Protocol.
